name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Bug]"
labels: bug

---

**What is not working properly?**

Describe the feature that isn't working properly.

**How it actually works?**

Describe how the feature is working.

**How it should work?**

Describe how the feature should work.

**Additional context**

Add a list of things that should be checked when implementing this feature. Suggestions: where to look at, how to fix this bug, and more info that help us replicate this bug and mitigate this issue.
